summary: CUSTOM ORDER FEATURE TEST for SeknuTo.cz - New 'Služby na objednávku' (custom_order) flow tested. 7/7 backend tests passed (100%). Full UI flow verified through all 5 steps. Standard booking regression passed.
passed_tests: === CUSTOM ORDER FEATURE (NEW) ===
Step 1: 'Služby na objednávku' section visible with 'ZAKÁZKA' badge
Step 1: Can select 'Poptávka na zakázkové práce' option showing 'Dle dohody' price
Step 2: Custom order form shows customer type selection (Soukromá osoba / Firma)
Step 2: 9 work type checkboxes visible (garden_design, lawn_installation, planting, etc.)
Step 2: Description textarea visible for custom requirements
Step 2: Validation error 'Vyberte alespoň jeden typ práce' shown when no work type selected
Step 3: Shows 'Dle dohody' price instead of calculated price
Step 3: Calendar date selection works correctly
Step 4: 'Cena dle dohody' info box visible (amber background)
Step 4: Coupon section correctly HIDDEN for custom order
Step 4: Submit button says 'Odeslat poptávku' (not 'Odeslat rezervaci')
Step 5: Success message 'Vaše poptávka byla úspěšně odeslána'
Step 5: Shows 'Služby na objednávku' service name
Step 5: Shows 'Dle dohody' price in confirmation
=== BACKEND API ===
POST /api/bookings with service=custom_order returns 200 with booking id
Custom order booking persisted in database (verified via GET)
Notes field contains '[ZAKÁZKOVÁ PRÁCE]' marker with customer type and work types
estimated_price=0 for custom orders (price is 'Dle dohody')
=== STANDARD BOOKING REGRESSION ===
Step 1: 'Základní služby' section expanded by default with 5 services
Step 2: Property size input and price preview visible (~400 Kč for 200m²)
Step 4: Coupon section visible for standard booking
Step 4: Price summary shows actual price in Kč
Step 4: Submit button says 'Odeslat rezervaci'
POST /api/bookings with service=lawn_mowing returns 200
POST /api/pricing/calculate returns correct price (200m² × 2 Kč = 400 Kč)
POST /api/pricing/calculate with condition=overgrown applies 1.5x multiplier
critical_code_review_comments: CUSTOM ORDER FLOW: Correctly implemented with separate step 2 form (customer type, work types, description)
PRICE DISPLAY: 'Dle dohody' shown in steps 3, 4, and 5 for custom orders
BUTTON TEXT: 'Odeslat poptávku' for custom orders vs 'Odeslat rezervaci' for standard
COUPON SECTION: Correctly hidden for custom orders (line 1051: !isCustomOrder(formData.service))
NOTES FORMAT: Custom order notes include [ZAKÁZKOVÁ PRÁCE] marker with structured data
SERVICE_NAMES: custom_order mapped to 'Práce na objednávku' in backend (line 82)

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all custom order steps 1-5 verified, standard booking regression passed)

test_credentials.test_bookings_created: Multiple custom_order and lawn_mowing test bookings

seed_data_creation: Created test custom_order bookings during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Custom order feature fully tested. New 'Služby na objednávku' section in Step 1 with ZAKÁZKA badge. Step 2 shows special form with customer type (Soukromá osoba/Firma), 9 work type checkboxes, and description textarea. Validation requires at least one work type. Steps 3-5 show 'Dle dohody' instead of price. Step 4 hides coupon section and shows 'Odeslat poptávku' button. Step 5 shows 'poptávka byla úspěšně odeslána'. Standard booking flow unchanged - coupon section visible, price calculated, 'Odeslat rezervaci' button.

mocked_apis.note: Google Calendar and Resend emails are mocked/not fully configured. Core booking functionality works.
